description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical, bulging shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves held together by three prominent black metal hoops. The wood displays a natural grain with warm brown and amber tones, and there are visible signs of weathering and staining, suggesting outdoor or heavy-duty use. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and made of the same wood, with the top appearing to be securely closed. One side of the barrel features a dark marking or symbol, possibly for identification or branding, and there are patches of discoloration that add to its aged appearance. The metal hoops are slightly worn and have a matte finish, providing structural reinforcement. There are no visible handles or spouts, and the overall construction suggests it is designed for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods.
description: A weathered wooden barrel with black metal hoops, flat wooden top, and visible aging marks. One side features a dark symbol and stained patches, giving it an authentic, rugged look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the barrel's bulging shape, wood grain, and three black metal hoops, with a clean, unstained surface.
description_view_1: This side displays a dark marking or symbol on the upper section and visible yellowish stains on the wood, highlighting its used condition.
description_view_2: A clean side with uninterrupted wood grain and metal hoops, lacking any markings or significant stains.
description_view_3: This view reveals more yellowish stains on the lower and middle sections, with the metal hoops and wood grain clearly visible.
